ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hosting_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hosting plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the hosting plan (e.g., Basic, Starter, Business) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hosting plan */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the hosting plan */,
  "plan_type" TEXT /* Type of hosting plan (e.g., shared, VPS, dedicated) */,
  "disk_space" TEXT /* Disk space allocated to the hosting plan */,
  "bandwidth" TEXT /* Bandwidth allocated to the hosting plan */,
  "addons" TEXT /* Additional features or services included with the hosting plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., domains, domain installation, WordPress) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_category" TEXT /* Category of the feature (e.g., performance, security, support) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_features" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hosting plan */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "limit" INTEGER /* Limit of the feature for this plan (e.g., number of domains, pages) */,
  "is_enabled" INTEGER /* Whether the feature is enabled for the hosting plan */,
  "default_limit" INTEGER /* Default limit for the feature (e.g., number of domains, pages) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id", "feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer account */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's physical address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Customer's company name (if applicable) */,
  "vat_number" TEXT /* Customer's VAT number (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the subscription */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hosting plan subscribed to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription is set to renew */,
  "auto_renew" INTEGER /* Whether the subscription is set to auto-renew */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES hosting_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billings" (
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription being billed */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the billing */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the billing was generated */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the billing (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billings_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing being invoiced */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., pending, paid, overdue) */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms for the invoice (e.g., due upon receipt, net 30) */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Unique invoice number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_billing_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_id") REFERENCES billings ("billing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the usage */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature being used */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the usage (e.g., number of pages, domains) */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the usage was recorded */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature used (for easier querying) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hosting plan */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature (if applicable) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES hosting_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
